overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City. The journey begins in a commercial district with shops and pedestrians, transitions through highway overpasses and tunnels, and ends in the Crestmont district with large digital billboards. The lighting suggests late afternoon with long shadows and a warm golden hue.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and diners

events.description: vehicle proceeds through intersection with green traffic light
vehicle slows down while passing pedestrian area with shops

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial district, observing shop facades and pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: walking along sidewalk near colorful shop fronts

low-rise commercial structure with large windows and signage
retro-style diner with red and white facade and neon signage
tall palm tree lining the commercial street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a sunlit commercial intersection with traffic lights overhead. Colorful shop facades line the left side while a retro diner sits on the right. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks and the vehicle slows to observe the street activity.

events.description: turning corner from commercial street onto main road with large neon sign
accelerating onto wider road with highway access visible ahead

agents.ego_description: turning left at intersection and accelerating past the Kendachi store with prominent red neon signage

notable_agents.action: van driving in adjacent lane, moving same direction

entered.detail: commercial building with large red neon 'KENDACHI' signage on roof
elevated highway structure visible in the distance
directional signage indicating Westbrook district

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns left past the prominent Kendachi building with its bright red neon sign. The scene opens onto a wider road with highway overpasses visible ahead. Other vehicles appear on the road as the camera accelerates toward the highway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with overpasses and industrial structures

events.description: transitioning from commercial street to highway infrastructure with tall buildings in background
descending ramp into underpass area with reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: accelerating on highway approach, navigating between overpasses with skyscrapers visible in the distance

steep concrete walls lining the descending highway ramp

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto a wide highway approach with massive overpasses and industrial scaffolding. Futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background against a clear sky. The road descends into a concrete channel as the vehicle follows the curving ramp downward.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken highway underpass with concrete walls

events.description: entering shadow of underpass, lighting shifts from bright sun to dim artificial
exiting tunnel back into sunlight, sudden brightness increase

agents.ego_description: descending through the underpass tunnel, emerging into a sunken highway corridor with high concrete walls

large illuminated billboard advertising 'CAT CRADLE' visible on the overpass
high concrete retaining walls lining the sunken highway
pedestrian or utility bridge crossing over the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a shadowy underpass with concrete walls and ceiling, dramatically reducing the natural light. A large 'CAT CRADLE' billboard is visible on the overpass above. The vehicle emerges from the tunnel into a sunken highway corridor with high walls on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunken highway with traffic control and intersection

events.description: approaching traffic light, slowing to a stop at red signal
traffic light changes to green, vehicle begins accelerating
passing under Crestmont district sign, entering new commercial zone

agents.ego_description: stopping at red traffic light in sunken highway, then accelerating through intersection into Crestmont district

notable_agents.action: teal sedan stopped ahead at the red light, then proceeding through intersection

red and white sign indicating 'Crestmont' district mounted on the traffic gantry
massive digital advertising screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
complex stacked highway interchange with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at a red traffic light under a large gantry displaying the 'Crestmont' sign. Other vehicles wait ahead in the sunken highway. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, passing under the sign and emerging into a district with massive digital billboards and multi-level highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: Crestmont commercial district with digital advertising

events.description: continuing through commercial district with large digital displays visible

agents.ego_description: cruising through Crestmont district, passing large digital billboards and commercial buildings

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising displays with bright pink and blue graphics
street-level shops and commercial buildings lining the road
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the Crestmont commercial district, passing under elevated highway structures supported by massive concrete columns. Large neon billboards with bright digital displays dominate the left side while street-level shops line the right. The road stretches ahead toward distant mountains under a clear afternoon sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that begins in a sunlit commercial district and descends into a sunken highway corridor before emerging into a neon-lit urban center. It begins by navigating a bright intersection lined with colorful shop facades and a retro diner, before turning left past a red neon Kendachi sign toward a widening road. As the vehicle accelerates, the scene opens onto a massive highway approach with industrial scaffolding and skyscrapers, eventually curving downward into a shadowy concrete underpass beneath a Cat Cradle billboard. The camera then emerges from the tunnel into a sunken corridor, pausing at a red light under a Crestmont gantry before accelerating forward into a district of multi-level highway structures. Finally, the view expands through the Crestmont commercial area, passing massive concrete columns and towering digital billboards that stretch toward distant mountains under a clear afternoon sky.
